steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the exact business outcome this process produces, stated in one sentence.] This runbook covers [process name]. It is executed when [trigger condition]. The expected outcome is [result]. Failure to execute correctly results in [consequence].

[Replace with: the exact access, tools, credentials, and permissions required before starting.] Prerequisites: [access to system X], [permission level Y], [tool Z installed and authenticated]. If any of these are missing, stop here and contact [owner role] before proceeding.

[Replace with: the exact first action in the process — which system to open, which URL to navigate to, which button or form to use.] Navigate to [system] at [URL or path]. Log in with [credential type]. Confirm you are viewing [specific page or state] before proceeding.

[Replace with: the core operational action — the exact button, field, command, or decision point.] Click [button or element]. Enter [value] in [field]. Confirm the value matches [expected format or example]. Do not proceed until the system returns [specific confirmation].

[Replace with: the exact verification step — what to check, where to look, and what a correct result looks like.] After completing Step 2, verify that [system or dashboard] shows [expected state]. If the result shows [incorrect state] instead, do not continue — see the Exceptions chapter of this runbook.

[Replace with: the final action that marks process completion — submit, close, archive, or notify.] Click [final button]. The system will display [confirmation message or state]. This is the normal end state. Record the completion in [log / ticket / sheet] with [required fields].

steps.stepTitle: Exception — what to do if a step fails
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the most common failure mode, its exact error message or symptom, and the recovery action.] If [Step N] fails with [error message or symptom]: (1) [first recovery action], (2) [second recovery action], (3) if unresolved after [N minutes], escalate to [role] via [channel]. Do not retry more than [N] times.

[Replace with: the second most common failure mode and its resolution.] If instead you encounter [alternate error or edge case]: [resolution steps]. This typically occurs when [root cause condition]. It resolves automatically after [N minutes] or requires [manual action] by [role].

steps.stepTitle: Owner — who is responsible for this process
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the exact role, team, and individual (if applicable) who owns this process and is accountable for its accuracy.] Process owner: [role title], [team name]. Current owner: [name or leave as role]. Questions or corrections: contact via [channel]. On-call escalation: [escalation path].

steps.stepTitle: Review date — when this runbook must be re-verified
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the next scheduled review date and the condition that would trigger an out-of-cycle review.] Next review: [date]. Review trigger conditions: [system upgrade], [process change], [incident involving this runbook]. To update this document, follow the [runbook update process link].

aiOutputs.title: Process Runbook — Ops Standard
aiOutputs.summary: [Replace with: one formal sentence naming the process, its trigger condition, and the team responsible for executing it.]
